KVK açıklaması

The Robotics and Artificial Intelligence program is designed for individuals who wish to specialize in the kinematic and dynamic analysis of robots, as well as in basic artificial intelligence and intelligent robotics algorithms. The program provides technical knowledge across a wide spectrum—from industrial robots to smart home systems.

Employment Opportunities

Graduates can work in fields such as production automation, logistics systems, healthcare technologies, and the defense industry, particularly in the installation and control of robotic systems.
